summary: TalentOS module MVP testing complete. All 4 TalentOS routes (/talentos, /talentos/workspace, /talentos/analysis, /talentos/interview) render correctly. Backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) for health, analyze, and evaluate-answer endpoints working. LLM responses are MOCKED using keyword matching (LLM key available but not configured for GPT).

issues: Web Speech API shows 'not supported' warning in browsers other than Chrome/Edge - this is expected browser limitation, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: LLM integration code is properly structured with fallback to mock responses when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is not available or configured
All data-testid attributes are present for interactive elements enabling robust test automation
Good error handling in backend with proper HTTP status codes
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - APIs use mock/keyword-matching responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: TalentOS module is fully functional at /talentos/* routes. Backend uses keyword matching for analysis (LLM available when key configured). Web Speech API in interview room requires Chrome/Edge browser. All CTAs and navigation flows verified working.
passed_tests: Backend API Tests (12/12 passed):
- /api/talentos/health returns healthy status with service info
- /api/talentos/analyze returns match_score, skill_gaps, interview_questions
- /api/talentos/analyze skill_gaps have correct structure (match/partial/gap status)
- /api/talentos/analyze interview_questions have correct difficulty levels
- /api/talentos/analyze extracts job title from JD keywords
- /api/talentos/analyze handles empty resume gracefully
- /api/talentos/evaluate-answer returns STAR scores (situation, task, action, result)
- /api/talentos/evaluate-answer gives lower scores for poor answers
- /api/talentos/evaluate-answer gives higher scores for STAR-structured answers
- /api/talentos/evaluate-answer detects result keywords correctly
- /api/talentos/analyze accepts linkedin_url parameter
- Invalid endpoints return 404/405
Frontend UI Tests (all passed):
- /talentos landing page renders with hero section 'Your AI Interview Coach'
- TalentOS branding visible with 'by AdsGupta' tagline
- Hero CTA 'Start Free Analysis' button navigates to /talentos/workspace
- Get Started Free button in header works
- Bottom CTA 'Start Free Analysis' button exists
- Features section with Bento grid renders
- /talentos/workspace shows 3-step form (Resume Upload, JD, LinkedIn)
- Resume dropzone component renders with proper styling
- JD text input with Paste/URL toggle works
- LinkedIn profile input (optional) available
- Analyze button disabled without resume (proper validation)
- /talentos/analysis shows match score with circular progress
- Skill Gap Analysis section with 6 skills displayed
- Interview Questions section with difficulty badges
- Action Plan section with improvement items
- Readiness scores (Technical, Behavioral, Industry, Communication)
- Start Mock Interview button navigates to /talentos/interview
- /talentos/interview shows STAR Method Score panel
- Interview Tips section visible
- Question counter 'Question 1 of 3' shown
- Start Interview button present and clickable

mocked_apis.note: Resume/JD analysis uses keyword matching instead of GPT. LLM integration code present but EMERGENT_LLM_KEY not configured for GPT calls.
mocked_apis_list: /api/talentos/analyze - uses keyword matching for skill gap detection

design_review.overall: Apple-style dark mode design implemented correctly
positives: Consistent dark theme with proper contrast (#050505 background, white/zinc text)
Gradient accents (cyan-500 to blue-600) applied consistently
Good typography with Space Grotesk font for headings
Interactive elements have proper hover states
Glowing border effects add visual polish
notes: Footer renders correctly with proper copyright text
Navigation sticky header with blur effect works well
